description_long: This is a small, cylindrical juice can with a metallic finish and a pull-tab opening on top. The can features a dark blue background with vibrant, colorful graphics wrapping around its body, including abstract shapes in yellow, green, and purple. The surface appears glossy, reflecting light and giving the can a sleek appearance. The top of the can is silver, typical of aluminum beverage cans, and the pull-tab is clearly visible. No clear brand name or logo is legible on the visible sides, and there are no obvious illustrations of fruit or flavor. The can is compact, likely intended for single-serving consumption and easily portable for urban environments.
description: A small, glossy metallic juice can with colorful abstract graphics and a silver pull-tab top. The can is compact and visually vibrant, with no clear brand or fruit illustration visible.
description_view_0: Front view shows the can centered against a patterned background, with the pull-tab top and colorful graphics visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the cylindrical shape and the dark blue body with abstract color patterns, with the pull-tab less visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the opposite side of the can, with more of the abstract graphics and the metallic top visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view shows the can's curvature and the continuation of the colorful design, with the pull-tab slightly more visible than in view 1.
